question: Show the names of customers and names of dishes they order.
sql: SELECT customer.Name, customer_order.Dish_Name FROM customer JOIN customer_order ON customer.Customer_ID = customer_order.Customer_ID

back_translation.intent: 查询特定客户及其订购的特定菜品
filters: customer.Name IN ('Arthur Morris', 'Denis Compton', 'Donald Bradman', 'Cyril Washbrook', 'Len Hutton')
customer_order.Dish_Name IN ('Spring Rolls', 'Kung Pao Chicken', 'Ma Po Tofu', 'Peking Roasted Duck', 'Chow Mein')

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求展示所有客户及其订购的菜品，而SQL反向翻译的描述中限定了具体的客户和菜品名称，导致语义不一致。
